items.name: Floating Pose ⭐️ FIXED
items.description:
⭐FAV FOR CHEAPER⭐

Give your avatar a dreamy, magical vibe with the Floating Pose emote! This graceful and aesthetic UGC animation is perfect for players who love soft, elegant, and mystical idle poses. Whether you’re creating profile pictures, edits, roleplaying, or showcasing your avatar in social worlds, this emote adds charm, personality, and a floating, ethereal style.

Designed with smooth motion and a clean loop, Floating Pose works perfectly in aesthetic worlds, social hangouts, party games, and avatar showcases. Make your character stand out, radiate magical energy, and let your avatar float with style!

Equip it, favorite it, and let your avatar glide with elegance and charm! ✨💫

items.name: Ivory Ronin Coat [PBR]
items.description:
✨⚔️ Pure elegance with a warrior’s soul.
This refined ivory coat blends ceremonial beauty with a battle-ready silhouette. Soft off-white fabric is accented by muted gold trims and layered folds, while the tied belt and blade detail add a subtle ronin-inspired edge—perfect for noble fighters, sages, or elite NPCs.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Elegant ivory color with gold-accent detailing
Flowing layered design that looks natural in motion
Balanced mix of ceremonial, fantasy, and samurai aesthetics
Ideal for roleplay, RPG worlds, and premium avatar outfits
🔍 Keywords: robe, ronin coat, samurai outfit, fantasy clothing, ivory robe, warrior outfit, elegant coat, rpg outfit, anime style, roblox clothes

This model includes high-quality PBR textures.
